title: Routes
empty: No routes yet — create one to expose a logical model name.

form.settingsHint: Optional. Known key: circuit_breaker { consecutive_failures, cooldown_secs, error_rate? } — overrides the provider's breaker for this route.

delete.routeConfirm: This deletes route "{{name}}" with its members and aliases. Clients calling this logical model will fail.
delete.memberConfirm: Remove this member from the route?
delete.aliasConfirm: Delete alias "{{name}}"? The exposed model name stops resolving.

members.title: Members
members.empty: No members — this route resolves to nothing.
members.modelHint: The provider's model id. Suggestions come from the provider's registered models; any string is allowed.
members.tierHint: Lower = higher priority. Tier 0 is primary; higher tiers are failover.
members.weightHint: Within a tier, higher weight gets more traffic under the weighted strategy.
members.mixedProtocol: Members of one route should share a protocol; mixing channels here is allowed but transforms differ per backend.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.empty: No aliases point to this route.
aliases.aliasHint: An externally-visible model name that resolves to this route. Must be globally unique.
aliases.duplicate: That alias name is already taken.
